title: Daily Memory System Setup
summary: Discussed building a daily memory dashboard to track all decisions, action items, and project progress across sessions. The goal is to have a searchable, filterable web app that serves as the team's institutional memory.
decisions: Build web dashboard for daily logs
Use Next.js + JSON files (no external DB)
Deploy via Vercel with GitHub auto-deploy

title: MKJ Release Strategy Update
summary: Reviewed the weekly release cadence. Discussed canvas video generation pipeline improvements with Kling v3. New approach: generate 3 canvas options per release, let Marlon pick the best one.
actionItems: Test Kling v3 with new cover art
